spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates the spec's headline surface — page mentions 1 of 2 extracted API names from the spec.

interactive.rationale: Real controls + script-driven side-effects make this hands-on, not a static card.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Page covers the promises the feature index makes for this concept.

edge_cases.rationale: Page handles several edge cases (errors, fallbacks, feature detection, denials) — not just the happy path.

references.rationale: The concept includes the required https://chromestatus.com/feature/5140168270413824 link plus the DBSC developer guide and WICG explainer.

design_system.rationale: Raw badge colors were replaced with shared CSS variables, and local button background overrides already pair color.

summary: The missing ChromeStatus reference and raw-color findings are resolved while preserving the live P-256 proof-of-possession lab.
